title: Idea Wrangler Seed
description: The structured output of André's /brain-fart triage — the typed input to the Idea Wrangler agent. The agent reads this from the file at $SANDBOX_INPUT. If it is missing or invalid, the agent fails loudly rather than guessing.

raw_idea.description: Mark's idea, VERBATIM. Never paraphrased. Reproduced as-is in section 1 of the concept.

initial_read.description: André's quick take on the idea.

why_mark_wants_it.description: André's guess at Mark's underlying intent / motivation.

suspected_problems.description: What André already thinks is wrong, risky, or contentious about the idea.

must_investigate.description: Pointers the agent should prioritise researching first.

short_name.description: Optional. A short slug for the idea (used in the issue title and idempotency check). If omitted, the agent derives one.
